abilities.name: Channel the Beyond
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may remove a Rift marker within 4" to gain a Fast token.

abilities.name: Manipulative
abilities.text: If this model has not yet activated this turn, enemy models may not cheat fate in opposed duels with this model.

actions.name: Sharp Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Shifting Gates
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Rift marker. Make a Rift marker within 4" of the target.

triggers.name: Burning Gate
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Df duel or gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
